  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Aggressive
    Aggressive class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.
    ArmyAllocator
     
    Benevolent
    Benevolent class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.
    Card
    Card class which represents the card model of the Risk game.
    CardController
    Card Controller Class
    CardManager
     
    CardView
    This class contains methods for setting up stage to view card.
    Cheater
    Cheater class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.
    ConnectedGraph
    Class containing the method to check whether a map is a connected graph or not
    Continent
    Continent class which provides information regarding the Continents.
    Country
    Class representing country data for game play.
    Dice
    Class for the dice.
    DiceController
    DiceController class contains the methods used in dice view, load attack screen, move armies, cancel move, cancel throw, continue Dice Roll, attack dice value, defence dice value and start dice roll.
    DiceView
    This class will setup attack window
    FortificationPhase
    Fortification Phase class contains methods for the Fortification phase of gameplay.
    GamePlayController
    This class provides all the methods to control various activities during the game play, implements Observer.
    GamePlayView
    This class provides the view for the user showing game screen.
    Human
    Human class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.
    ICardType
    Interface which defines the types of CARDS.
    IPlayerType
    Interface which defines the types of PLAYER.
    LaunchGameDriver
    Launches the Game and provides the main window and the view for the user, either to load or create a new map.
    LoadGame
    This class contains methods for setting up stage to view card.
    MapEditor
    Class proving the m=functionality for creating a new map or edit existing map according the risk game rules.
    MapEditorActions
     
    MapEditorPrinter
     
    MapGraph
    This MapGraph class contains all the methods to add , remove countries , continents and also to add , delete edges between countries.
    MapIO
    Map Input Output to read the contents from an existing map or to create a new Map for the game.
    MapSerializer
     
    MapValidate
    Map Validation class contains methods for the verification of a already map file, that the user will load for starting a game.
    NotificationManager
     
    Player
    Class for the player object for the class
    PlayerBehaviour
    PlayerBehaviour class contains methods for the Player Behavior.
    PlayerBehaviourFactory
     
    PlayerDetailsController
    This class provides the Controller options to handle the initial player details.
    PlayerDetailsView
    Provides the view for the user showing details of the players
    PlayerPhaseManager
     
    PlayerVictoryManager
     
    PlayerWorldDomination
    Players world domination view class.
    Random
    Random class contains methods for the Player Behavior Strategies of computer player.
    ReinforcementPhase
    ReinforcementPhase class contains the methods used in the reinforcement phase gameplay.
    ResourceManager
    Resource Manager class contains methods for saving game data into a file and loading game data from file
    RoundRobin
    RoundRobin approach to iterate the Player turns.
    SaveData
     
    StartUpPhase
    Class for governing the startup phase of the game.
    TournamentController
    This class provides all the methods to control various activities during the game play, implements Observer.
    TournamentModel
     
    TournamentView
     
    ValidationResult
    Classe utilitaire pour représenter le résultat d’une validation
    WindowUtil
    This class provides all the game utilities as to exit window,enable and disable button.
